overview: A stunning 3D animated portfolio website for Akhilesh Gusain, a Digital Marketing Enthusiast. Features liquid glass design throughout, floating animated project cards, 3D glass skill buttons, a course journey timeline, and 9 full portfolio pages including Home, Journey, Projects, Skills, Certificates, and Contact.
features: 3D liquid glass design throughout all pages
Animated floating project cards with 3D effects
Skills displayed as 3D liquid glass buttons
Multi-page navigation: Home, Journey, Projects, Other Tasks, Creatives, Tools, Skills, Certificates, Contact
Profile section with photo and bio
